tools.name: get_services
tools.description: Gets a list of all available services (commands) of the CLI utility

tools.name: get_variables
tools.description: Gets a list of user-defined variable names that can be used to specify parameter values when calling methods instead of actual data

tools.name: get_service_methods
tools.description: Gets a list of all methods for a specific service

service.description: Service name (command), for example: telegram, slack, notion

tools.name: get_method_parameters
tools.description: Gets a list of parameters for a specific service method with their description, types, and default values

tools.name: execute_method
tools.description: Executes a service method with specified parameters and returns the result
